subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! The Lord of the worlds maketh mention of thee from within the Most Great Prison, and counselleth thee with that which shall exalt the Cause of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد مولی العالم یذکرک فی السجن الاعظم و نوصیک بما یرتفع به امر الله
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @exhortations and counsels
